name: ShipEngine
description: Multi-carrier shipping API supporting 200+ carriers. Create shipments, compare rates, generate labels, track packages, validate addresses, and manage batches.

capabilities.name: addresses_validate
capabilities.description: Validate one or more addresses against carrier databases.

capabilities.name: addresses_recognize
capabilities.description: Extract structured address data from unstructured text.

capabilities.name: shipments_list
capabilities.description: List shipments with filters for status, batch, tags, and dates.

capabilities.name: shipments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new shipment record with addresses and package details.

capabilities.name: shipments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific shipment by ID.

capabilities.name: shipments_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing shipment's details.

capabilities.name: shipments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an existing shipment.

capabilities.name: rates_estimate
capabilities.description: Get shipping rate estimates with minimal information.

capabilities.name: rates_calculate
capabilities.description: Calculate shipping rates across multiple carriers for a shipment.

capabilities.name: rates_bulk
capabilities.description: Get rates for multiple shipments in a single request.

capabilities.name: rates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific rate quote by ID.

capabilities.name: labels_list
capabilities.description: Query labels with filters for status, carrier, and date range.

capabilities.name: labels_purchase
capabilities.description: Purchase and generate a shipping label.

capabilities.name: labels_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve label details by ID.

capabilities.name: labels_create_from_rate
capabilities.description: Create a label using a previously quoted rate.

capabilities.name: labels_create_from_shipment
capabilities.description: Create a label from an existing shipment.

capabilities.name: labels_void
capabilities.description: Void a label and request a refund.

capabilities.name: labels_create_return
capabilities.description: Generate a return label with optional RMA number.

capabilities.name: labels_track
capabilities.description: Retrieve tracking information for a label.

capabilities.name: tracking_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve tracking information for a label by ID.

capabilities.name: batches_list
capabilities.description: List batches with filters for status and date range.

capabilities.name: batches_create
capabilities.description: Create a new batch for bulk label generation.

capabilities.name: batches_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve batch details by ID.

capabilities.name: batches_add_shipments
capabilities.description: Add shipments or rates to an existing batch.

capabilities.name: batches_remove_shipments
capabilities.description: Remove shipments from a batch.

capabilities.name: batches_process
capabilities.description: Process a batch for label generation.

capabilities.name: batches_errors
capabilities.description: List processing errors for a batch.

capabilities.name: carriers_list
capabilities.description: List all connected carrier accounts.

capabilities.name: carriers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific carrier.

capabilities.name: carriers_services
capabilities.description: List available services for a specific carrier.

capabilities.name: carriers_packages
capabilities.description: List supported package types for a carrier.

capabilities.name: carriers_options
capabilities.description: List available shipping options for a carrier.

capabilities.name: carriers_add_funds
capabilities.description: Add funds to a carrier account balance.

capabilities.name: manifests_list
capabilities.description: List manifests with filters for warehouse, date range, and carrier.

capabilities.name: manifests_create
capabilities.description: Create a manifest for carrier shipment pickup.

capabilities.name: manifests_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve manifest details by ID.

capabilities.name: packages_list
capabilities.description: List custom package types.

capabilities.name: packages_create
capabilities.description: Define a new custom package type.

capabilities.name: packages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a custom package type by ID.

capabilities.name: packages_update
capabilities.description: Modify an existing custom package type.

capabilities.name: packages_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a custom package type.

capabilities.name: pickups_list
capabilities.description: List scheduled carrier pickups.

capabilities.name: pickups_schedule
capabilities.description: Schedule a carrier pickup.

capabilities.name: pickups_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve scheduled pickup details by ID.

capabilities.name: pickups_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a scheduled pickup.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for specific shipping events.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve webhook details by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook URL or configuration.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: service_points_list
capabilities.description: Find carrier service points (drop-off locations) by location.

capabilities.name: service_points_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific carrier service point.
